goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should 'leave after 17:00' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on wednesday
The train should leave after 17:00 and should depart from london kings cross
Make sure you get train ID and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
